name: ab-testing
tagline: Guides A/B test design, sample sizing, and analysis, plus running a recurring growth-experimentation program with ICE scoring.
verdict: Thorough, internally consistent, well-templated skill with clear triggers, defined output templates (hypothesis, playbook, iteration log), and bulk material properly split into reference files. Only ding: the description field is an oversized wall of trigger phrases.

highlights.summary: Description is a ~800-char wall of quoted trigger phrases, far past the 1-5 sentence guidance.
